T1078.name: Valid Accounts
T1078.description: Adversaries may obtain and abuse credentials of existing accounts as a means of gaining Initial Access.
T1078.query_template: SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where ResultType == 0 | summarize count() by UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, CountryOrRegion | where count_ > 20

T1059.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
T1059.description: Adversaries may abuse command and script interpreters to execute commands, scripts, or binaries.
T1059.query_template: DeviceProcessEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where FileName in~ ('powershell.exe','cmd.exe','wscript.exe','cscript.exe') | where ProcessCommandLine contains '-enc' or ProcessCommandLine contains 'DownloadString' | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, ProcessCommandLine

T1136.name: Create Account
T1136.description: Adversaries may create an account to maintain access to victim systems.
T1136.query_template: SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where EventID in (4720, 4726) | project TimeGenerated, Account, Computer, Activity

T1053.name: Scheduled Task/Job
T1053.description: Adversaries may abuse task scheduling functionality to facilitate initial or recurring execution of malicious code.
T1053.query_template: DeviceProcessEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where FileName =~ 'schtasks.exe' and ProcessCommandLine contains '/create' | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, ProcessCommandLine

T1055.name: Process Injection
T1055.description: Adversaries may inject code into processes in order to evade process-based defenses as well as possibly elevate privileges.
T1055.query_template: DeviceProcessEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ('explorer.exe','svchost.exe') | where FileName in~ ('rundll32.exe','regsvr32.exe','mshta.exe') | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName

T1003.name: OS Credential Dumping
T1003.description: Adversaries may attempt to dump credentials to obtain account login and credential material.
T1003.query_template: DeviceProcessEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where FileName in~ ('lsass.exe','procdump.exe','mimikatz.exe') or ProcessCommandLine has_any ('sekurlsa','logonpasswords','lsadump') | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, ProcessCommandLine

T1021.name: Remote Services
T1021.description: Adversaries may use valid accounts to log into a service specifically designed to accept remote connections.
T1021.query_template: SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where EventID == 4624 | where LogonType == 10 or LogonType == 3 | summarize Targets=dcount(Computer), TargetList=make_set(Computer) by Account | where Targets > 3

T1041.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
T1041.description: Adversaries may steal data by exfiltrating it over an existing command and control channel.
T1041.query_template: DeviceNetworkEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where RemoteIPType == 'Public' | summarize Bytes=sum(AdditionalFields.BytesSent), Connections=count() by DeviceName, RemoteIP | where Bytes > 50000000

T1486.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
T1486.description: Adversaries may encrypt data on target systems or on large numbers of systems in a network to interrupt availability to system and network resources.
T1486.query_template: DeviceFileEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where ActionType == 'FileModified' | summarize Extensions=make_set(extractjson('$.FileExtension', AdditionalFields)), Count=count() by DeviceName | where Count > 100

T1566.name: Phishing
T1566.description: Adversaries may send phishing messages to gain access to victim systems.
T1566.query_template: OfficeActivity | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where Operation == 'AttachmentAccessed' | where SourceFileExtension in~ ('exe','bat','ps1','vbs','lnk','hta') | project TimeGenerated, UserId, SourceFileName

T1548.name: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism
T1548.description: Adversaries may circumvent mechanisms designed to control elevate privileges to gain higher-level permissions.
T1548.query_template: SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where EventID == 4672 and SubjectUserName !endswith '$' | where PrivilegeList contains 'SeDebugPrivilege' | project TimeGenerated, SubjectUserName, PrivilegeList, Computer

T1069.name: Permission Groups Discovery
T1069.description: Adversaries may attempt to find group and permission settings to identify how they can abuse or use existing roles.
T1069.query_template: DeviceProcessEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('net group','net localgroup','Get-ADGroupMember') | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine

T1018.name: Remote System Discovery
T1018.description: Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of other systems by IP address, hostname, or other logical identifier on a network.
T1018.query_template: DeviceNetworkEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago({window}) | summarize Targets=dcount(RemoteIP) by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName | where Targets > 50 | project-away Targets
